title: MPRA biological case studies. Case A shows that GenomeCF changes configuration choice on the BCL11A enhancer MPRA task by favoring a temperature-scaled CNN over the default CNN. Case B shows that GenomeCF changes model choice on the MYC enhancer MPRA task by favoring DNABERT-2 for top-ranked variant nomination even though the 6-mer baseline has stronger global AUROC and AUPRC.
notes: Merges case-study summaries with top-k precision values from external validation results.
license_or_restrictions: Derived summary only; no raw MPRA records redistributed here.
